title: ENOENT error with relative paths in binary file node
symptom: Using relative paths in the Read/Write Binary File node results in an ENOENT error, indicating that the file cannot be found. Absolute paths work correctly, but relative paths do not.
applies_when: Relative paths specified for file operations
not_this_if: The node is not configured for file operations
root_cause: When n8n runs as a service, the working directory is set to the installation root rather than the user's project folder. This causes relative paths to fail because they are resolved from the wrong directory.
fix_steps: Use absolute paths for all file operations in the node
Alternatively, use environment variables to construct paths, e.g., {{$ENV.N8N_DATA_DIR}}/file.txt
agent_instruction: Switch to using absolute paths or environment variables for file paths in the Read/Write Binary File node.
